summary: Ukrainian FPV drone operators are intensifying ambushes against Russian forces on the Pokrovsk axis, with multiple strikes reported including simultaneous hits on a Russian soldier behind a tree and a Ukrainian backhoe near Bolshoy Sokolny Island. Russian forces are countering with log-periodic directional antennas on "Molniyas," improving range and jamming resistance while complicating Ukrainian interception efforts. On the Kherson front, Ukrainian drones struck a BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island. Meanwhile, Iranian-backed militias used fiber-optic FPV drones to attack US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport, and Russian infantry faced novel threats, including a soldier losing a bayonet duel against an FPV drone.
